sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 에머슨, 3분기 순매출 45억 5,300만 달러·조정 EPS 1.43달러, 연간 가이던스 상향

keyPoints.text: 3분기 순매출이 45억 5,300만 달러로 전년 동기 43억 8,000만 달러에서 증가했습니다.
회사는 2025 회계연도 조정 주당순이익 가이던스를 약 6.00달러로, GAAP 주당순이익을 약 4.08달러로 상향했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 분기 세그먼트 EBITA는 11억 8,900만 달러, 조정 세그먼트 EBITA는 12억 3,200만 달러였습니다.
경영진은 견조한 기저 성장과 수익성, 현금흐름이 회계연도 말까지 이어질 것으로 전망했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 관세 비용 노출 축소를 반영해 가격 인상 기대치를 갱신하며 약 3.5% 성장을 전망했습니다.

watchItems.text: 상향된 조정 EPS 가이던스 6.00달러 달성과 관세 환경 변화에 따른 가격 전략이 핵심 변수입니다.
주요 전방시장의 긍정적 모멘텀이 회계연도 말까지 이어질지 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2025q3release_ex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Emerson Reports Third Quarter 2025 Results; Updates 2025 Outlook ST. LOUIS, Aug. 6, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Emerson (NYSE: EMR) today reported results 1 for its third quarter ended June 30, 2025 and updated its full year outlook for fiscal 2025. Emerson also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5275 p er share of common stock payable September 10, 2025 to stockholders of record on August 15, 2025. (dollars in millions, except per share) 2024 Q3 2025 Q3 Change Underlying Orders 2 4% Net Sales $4,380 $4,553 4% Underlying Sales 3 3% Pretax Earnings  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.5275 = 0.5275달러; $4,380 = 4,380달러; $4,553 = 4,553달러; $455 = 455달러; $734 = 734달러; $1,189 = 1,189달러; $1,232 = 1,232달러; $0.60 = 0.60달러; $1.43 = 1.43달러; $970 = 970달러; 1,067 million = 10억 6,700만 달러; 4,380 million = 43억 8,000만 달러; 4,553 million = 45억 5,300만 달러; 1,189 million = 11억 8,900만 달러; 1,232 million = 12억 3,200만 달러; 1,062 million = 10억 6,200만 달러.

solid third quarter results reflect our sustained momentum, delivering strong underlying growth, profitability and cash flow, which we expect to continue as we finish the fiscal year,” said Emerson President and Chief Executive Officer Lal Karsanbhai. “We are experiencing positive momentum in key end markets, and our team's ability to execute in this dynamic environment demonstrates the resilience of our business model and our operational excellence." Karsanbhai continued, “We are taking pivotal steps to advance our industrial software capabilities, launching breakthrough innovations that are transforming how our customers optimize their operations. We deliver value by unlocking productivity and efficiency, and we are seeing accelerated adoption of our digital solutions.” 2025 Outlook The following table summarizes the fiscal year 2025 guidance framework. Net and underlying sales

of ~3.5% growth reflects our updated expectations for pricing actions as the tariff expense exposure has reduced. GAAP EPS is now expected to be ~$4.08 and adjusted EPS guidance is now ~$6.00, an increase versus the previous midpoint. Expectations for operating cash flow and free cash flow increase to ~$3.6B and ~$3.2B, respectively. The 2025 outlook assumes returning ~$2.3B to shareholders through $1.1B of share repurchases and ~$1.2B of dividends, unchanged from the prior guidance. 2025 Q4 2025 Net Sales Growth 5.5% - 6.5% ~3.5% Underlying Sales Growth 5% - 6% ~3.5% Earnings Per Share $1.13 - $1.17 ~$4.08 Amortization of Intangibles ~$0.34 ~$1.34 Restructuring / Related Costs ~$0.10 ~$0.22 Acquisition / Divestiture Fees and  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.08 = 4.08달러; $6.00 = 6.00달러; $3.6 = 3.6달러; $3.2 = 3.2달러; $2.3 = 2.3달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $1.13 = 1.13달러; $0.34 = 0.34달러; $0.27 = 0.27달러; $0.22 = 0.22달러; $0.01 = 0.01달러; $0.09 = 0.09달러; $1.58 = 1.58달러; $1.62 = 1.62달러.
